plugins.name: hitl
plugins.description: HITL AI-Driven Development (2.x line, current). 50 skills, 6 agents, enforcement hooks, and templates for the full governed delivery workflow — the step plan is derived per change from impact analysis — plus the platform readiness workflow (onboarded to delivery-ready) with a hard production-deploy gate. Start work with /hitl:dev-start-change.

plugins.name: hitl-1x
plugins.description: HITL AI-Driven Development — legacy 1.x line (v1.1.0). The numbered 31-step delivery workflow plus the platform readiness workflow and hard production-deploy gate. For teams not yet ready to move to 2.x; feature-frozen except critical fixes. Install this OR hitl, not both. Start work with /hitl:dev-start-change.
